creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Dear sir, first of all thanks for the willingness to make FreeBSD better 
and taking the time to submit the information you did. Sadly it doesn't 
tell us much, in order to be able to help we need at least some 
information from the system (verbose boot and pciconf -vl might help). 
Beyond that if no OSS project supports your card yet, I am not sure 
whether we can do that instantly as well. Please discuss these things on 
the questions@FreeBSD.org mailinglist in order to get a step further. I 
am closing the bug report, because this is not a bug (as yet). Thanks 
for your attention!
